query:
SELECT id AS "id: Id<Teams>", restream_consent, custom_choices AS "custom_choices: Json<HashMap<String, String>>" FROM teams, team_members WHERE
        id = team
        AND series = $1
        AND event = $2
        AND member = $3
        AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM team_members WHERE team = id AND status = 'unconfirmed')
        AND NOT resigned
